subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Most Merciful! I have heard how you have adorned a gathering and have arisen to serve the Sacred Threshold. Blessed are ye [3.5s]... ...The effulgence of the rays of the Sun of Truth is abundant and the favours of the Blessed Beauty surround the women believers and the handmaidens who have attained unto certitude
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اماء الرحمن از قرار مسموع محفلی آراستید و بخدمت آستان مقدس برخواستید طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @role and station of women, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
